CONTACT US

Order Now
WHAT
IS
LOKMA

At Lokma, we focus on the freshness and uniqueness of our products. We advocate the family values of sharing; and consider these to be the ingredients that guide us in this common adventure with you.

 

Our mission? To provide dessert lovers with unique, fresh and delicious pastries that they can personalize with our various exceptional toppings and enjoy with friends and family while enjoying an exceptional experience.

​

 

OUR STORY

The idea behind Lokma began after a trip to Turkey where the founders discovered a traditional Turkish pastry called Lokma. From the first bite of this little delight, they fell head over heels in love. Already having extensive training in restoration, the founders have recreated this authentic dessert by adding their own personal touch and are now proud to share it with you. In addition to being able to extend this wonderful culture through this dessert, the founders have developed a comprehensive menu in which everyone can find it’s ideal taste.

​

 

OUR
YUMMY
LOKMAS

Crispy and golden on the outside, and tender and soft on the inside, these little bites of heaven have something for everyone. We offer everyone the opportunity to customize their Lokma by offering a variety of trim options. Indeed, Lokma can not only be supple with cinnamon, covered with creamy chocolate, creamy caramel and can even be garnished with crumbled biscuits or crushed nuts. There
